tools.name: stocktoken_access_pricing
tools.description: List Free / Pro / Team pricing (ETH on-chain, no Stripe) and how agents pay for write tools.

tools.name: stocktoken_access_checkout
tools.description: Build on-chain ETH payment plan for Pro/Team. After user pays, call stocktoken_access_activate.

tools.name: stocktoken_access_activate
tools.description: After ETH payment to treasury is confirmed, verify and issue API key (shown once).

tools.name: stocktoken_access_status
tools.description: Check paid access for current API key context or a wallet owner.

tools.name: stocktoken_list
tools.description: AI Agent Tokenized Stock OS: list canonical tokenized stocks (Robinhood Stock Tokens), ETFs, USDG, and WETH on Robinhood Chain ID 4663. Use for AI agents trading tokenized equities/RWAs. Do NOT use for US brokerage equities (use Robinhood Trading MCP). Only registry addresses are real tokenized stoc

tools.name: stocktoken_get
tools.description: Get metadata for one canonical Stock Token or core asset by symbol (e.g. NVDA) or contract address on Robinhood Chain 4663. Use to verify a token is official before trading.

tools.name: stocktoken_price
tools.description: Read USD price and ERC-8056 uiMultiplier for a Robinhood Stock Token on chain 4663. Prefer this over generic price tools for Stock Tokens. Feed price already includes corporate-action multiplier when Chainlink is configured. Not for brokerage stock quotes.

tools.name: stocktoken_value_holdings
tools.description: Value a wallet's Stock Token / ETF / USDG balances on Robinhood Chain 4663. Use for portfolio analysis of onchain RWA holdings.

tools.name: stocktoken_policy_get
tools.description: Get current AI Agent Tokenized Stock OS agent policy (max notional, slippage, simulate-first, kill switch).

tools.name: stocktoken_policy_set
tools.description: Update session policy guardrails for AI Agent Tokenized Stock OS.

tools.name: stocktoken_quote
tools.description: AI Agent Tokenized Stock OS multi-venue quote: Uniswap Trading API, then 0x RFQ (Stock Tokens), then Chainlink oracle-indicative. Chain 4663.

tools.name: stocktoken_simulate
tools.description: Simulate / pre-trade check for a tokenized stock swap on chain 4663: allowlist, policy, multi-venue quote integrity.

tools.name: stocktoken_execute_plan
tools.description: Build non-custodial tx plan (approve + swap) via best venue (Uniswap / 0x). Does NOT sign or broadcast. Chain 4663.

tools.name: stocktoken_session_create
tools.description: Create a durable agent session with scoped permissions (persisted to DATA_DIR). Non-custodial.

tools.name: stocktoken_session_kill
tools.description: Kill an agent session immediately (kill switch).

tools.name: stocktoken_session_list
tools.description: List agent sessions, optionally filtered by owner.

tools.name: stocktoken_session_update
tools.description: Update limits/permissions on an existing session.

tools.name: stocktoken_protocols
tools.description: Return Uniswap Universal Router, PoolManager, WETH, USDG, and feed source metadata for Robinhood Chain 4663.

tools.name: stocktoken_fees
tools.description: Summarize disclosed AATOS execution fee events and on-chain monetization status (treasury / ETH fees).

tools.name: stocktoken_subscription_tiers
tools.description: List AATOS on-chain subscription tiers (paid in ETH to treasury). No Stripe.

tools.name: stocktoken_subscribe_plan
tools.description: Build non-custodial ETH subscription plan (tier pro|team, or custom ethAmount). Pays treasury on chain 4663.

tools.name: stocktoken_subscription_status
tools.description: Check on-chain subscription status for a wallet (requires SUBSCRIPTION_REGISTRY_ADDRESS when deployed).

tools.name: stocktoken_tip_presets
tools.description: List optional tip presets (ETH) and what assets the tip wallet accepts (ETH, any ERC-20 on 4663, optional native BTC). Tips never required.

tools.name: stocktoken_tip_assets
tools.description: What the AATOS tip wallet can accept: native ETH + any ERC-20 on Robinhood Chain 4663; optional native BTC address if configured.

tools.name: stocktoken_tip_plan
tools.description: Build OPTIONAL tip plan. asset=ETH (default) | BTC | registry symbol (USDG,WETH,NVDA,…) | 0x token. amount or ETH preset. User must confirm. Never coerce.

tools.name: stocktoken_metrics
tools.description: Operational metrics for this AI Agent Tokenized Stock OS process.

tools.name: stocktoken_morpho_status
tools.description: Morpho / Robinhood Earn status on chain 4663: Steakhouse USDG vault address, live TVL, share price.

tools.name: stocktoken_morpho_position
tools.description: Read a wallet's Morpho Earn (steakUSDG) share balance and underlying USDG on chain 4663.

tools.name: stocktoken_morpho_deposit_plan
tools.description: Build non-custodial ERC-4626 deposit plan (approve USDG + deposit) into Morpho Steakhouse Earn vault. Does NOT broadcast.

tools.name: stocktoken_morpho_withdraw_plan
tools.description: Build non-custodial Morpho Earn withdraw (by USDG) or redeem (by shares) plan. Does NOT broadcast.

tools.name: stocktoken_intent_typed_data
tools.description: Build EIP-712 typed data for an agent trade intent (offchain authorization standard). User/wallet signs; onchain verifier later.

tools.name: stocktoken_basket_preview
tools.description: Preview AI mega-cap basket constituents and live Chainlink prices (vault scaffold preview).

tools.name: stocktoken_permit2_prepare
tools.description: Prepare Permit2 approve + optional typed data for Uniswap-style flows on chain 4663.

tools.name: stocktoken_liquidity_matrix
tools.description: Liquidity / V3-executable route matrix for major USDG pairs on chain 4663. Use to know which Stock Tokens have live AMM fills.

tools.name: stocktoken_find_pools
tools.description: Scan for Uniswap V3 pools between two tokens on chain 4663. Useful when APIs block Stock Tokens.

tools.name: stocktoken_system_status
tools.description: Full system status: secrets, venues, chain, version, session count, fees.

tools.name: stocktoken_explain_routing
tools.description: Explain when to use AI Agent Tokenized Stock OS vs Robinhood official Agentic Trading MCP vs raw Uniswap/0x.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "stocktoken_intent_typed_data" references sensitive artifacts (authorization). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Build EIP-712 typed data for an agent trade intent (offchain authorization standard). User/wallet signs; onchain verifier later.

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "stocktoken_system_status" references sensitive artifacts (secret). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: Full system status: secrets, venues, chain, version, session count, fees.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "mcp" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: stocktoken_price · Private data: stocktoken_access_activate, stocktoken_access_status, stocktoken_list, stocktoken_get, stocktoken_price, stocktoken_value_holdings, stocktoken_quote, stocktoken_subscription_status, stocktoken_tip_presets, stocktoken_tip_assets, stocktoken_tip_plan, stocktoken_morpho_status, stocktoken_morpho_position, stocktoken_morpho_deposit_plan, stocktoken_intent_typed_data, stocktoken_basket_preview, stocktoken_liquidity_matrix, stocktoken_find_pools, stocktoken_system_status · Public sink: stocktoken_execute_plan, stocktoken_morpho_status, stocktoken_morpho_position, stocktoken_morpho_deposit_plan, stocktoken_morpho_withdraw_plan · Destructive: stocktoken_policy_get, stocktoken_execute_plan, stocktoken_session_kill.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: stocktoken_price · Private data: stocktoken_access_activate, stocktoken_access_status, stocktoken_list, stocktoken_get, stocktoken_price, stocktoken_value_holdings, stocktoken_quote, stocktoken_subscription_status, stocktoken_tip_presets, stocktoken_tip_assets, stocktoken_tip_plan, stocktoken_morpho_status, stocktoken_morpho_position, stocktoken_morpho_deposit_plan, stocktoken_intent_typed_data, stocktoken_basket_preview, stocktoken_liquidity_matrix, stocktoken_find_pools, stocktoken_system_status · Public sink: stocktoken_execute_plan, stocktoken_morpho_status, stocktoken_morpho_position, stocktoken_morpho_deposit_plan, stocktoken_morpho_withdraw_plan · Destructive: stocktoken_policy_get, stocktoken_execute_plan, stocktoken_session_kill

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
